nasb.text: Those deputies provided for King Solomon and all who came to King Solomon’s table, each in his month; they left nothing lacking.

esv.text: And those officers supplied provisions for King Solomon, and for all who came to King Solomon’s table, each one in his month. They let nothing be lacking.

cnv.text: 那些官員分別每月供應所羅門王和所有與所羅門王一同坐席的人的食物，從沒有缺少。

ccb.text: 十二个地方官按月供给所罗门王及王室的需用，使他们一无所缺。
